# minio_s3_bucket_versioning (Data Source)

Reads the versioning configuration of an existing S3 bucket.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "minio_s3_bucket_versioning" "example" {
  bucket = "my-bucket"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `bucket` (String)

### Read-Only

- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `suspended` (Boolean)
